report.summary: No new commits since last cycle (Apr 2); codebase stable — 724 published pages, 111 missing page.tsx files (known backlog), TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts (non-blocking), all 6 API routes healthy with defi-yields flagged for missing in-memory cache/fallback.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: TypeScript check: 25 errors in src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts — all parse-level (JSX in .ts file). Non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors:true in next.config.ts.

Published pages audit: 724 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES, 111 missing page.tsx files (wallets, taxes, investing/best, blog, courses, several learn guides). This is a known backlog — pages were added to the index before scaffolding.
Total page.tsx files in src/app: 1,251
No new pages built since last cycle — last commit was Apr 2 (4 learn guides + stablecoin yield tracker + 8 OG images).
No regressions detected since last cycle.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: prices (CoinGecko): HEALTHY — 60s TTL, in-memory cache, stale fallback, proper Cache-Control headers.
defi-yields (DefiLlama): MODERATE — missing in-memory cache and hardcoded fallback data. Relies on CDN caching only. Vulnerable to upstream outages.
fear-greed: HEALTHY — 600s TTL, in-memory cache, stale fallback.
trending (CoinGecko): HEALTHY — 300s TTL, in-memory cache, stale fallback.
market-metrics: HEALTHY — 60s TTL, Promise.allSettled pattern, mock data fallback.
market-dominance: EXCELLENT — 300s TTL, three-tier fallback (fresh → stale → hardcoded).
health endpoint: operational with rate limiting (100 req/min).
ACTION NEEDED: Add in-memory cache + fallback data to defi-yields route.

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest deploy: Apr 2 commit e3f63fc — feat: 4 new learn guides, 8 OG images, stablecoin yield tracker.
No new deploys since last cycle. Production is stable on the Apr 2 build.
Build config: standalone output, 8GB heap, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency:4, ignoreBuildErrors:true.
Cannot verify live site health from sandbox (egress blocked). No incidents reported.
No rollback needed — last deploy was clean (preceded by build fix 3b2dd28).

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Last shipped: Sprint with 4 learn guides, stablecoin yield tracker tool, 8 OG images, published pages update.
Prior build fix: removed 'use client' from 4 learn pages conflicting with metadata exports.
Carry-over: 111 published slugs need page.tsx scaffolding (wallets: 20, taxes: 15, investing/best: 12, learn: 28, blog: 9, courses: 6, other: 21).
Carry-over: defi-yields API route needs resilience upgrade (in-memory cache + fallback).
Carry-over: structured-data.examples.ts has 25 TS errors (JSX in .ts file — rename to .tsx or fix).
Publish queue: 722 pages still queued for future promotion.
No blockers requiring Jefe's immediate attention. Codebase is stable.
